rules.name: Hydration
rules.explanation: Baker's percentage comparing water to flour.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: 65-70% for beginners, 75-80% for open crumb, 80%+ for ciabatta-style.
Yes, a 100% hydration starter is equal parts flour and water. It affects total dough hydration.
